video_title: AI: freshly poured jar candles cooling spaced apart on a counter

seconds.vision_desc: A row of freshly poured cream jar candles spaced apart on a wooden workshop counter, soft warm evening light
camera tracks slowly along the row of cooling jar candles, faint wisps of steam rising
evenly spaced glass jars with liquid cream wax cooling, warm side light
tracking shot continues along the spaced row, wicks standing in soft wax
row of cooling candles on the wooden counter, gentle steam, warm glow
camera drifts past more spaced jars cooling on the bench
warm light across the row of freshly poured candles, even gaps between jars
final jars of the cooling row in soft evening workshop light
